name: Hunan Blended Spices
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon ground Szechwan peppercorns, or lemon pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small jar.
2. Shake well to mix thoroughly.
This blended spice mixture is ideal for adding authentic Hunan flavor to your Pork or Chicken recipes. Use about 1 teaspoon per 1 - 1 1/2 pounds of boneless meat and 1/2 cup liquid. The blend makes approximately 7 tablespoons.
